title: Multi-site Ultrasound-guided Fine Needle Aspiration from Human Lymph Nodes
author: Al-Diwani, Agrawal, et al.
materials: Ultrasound machine and probe (GE Healthcare LOGIQ E10, or equivalent)
Eight 1.5-ml Eppendorf tubes, each pre-filled with 1 ml sterile Dulbecco's phosphate-buffered saline (D-PBS)

steps.title: Additional Materials (also see Basic Protocol 1)
steps.instruction:
2% (w/v) lidocaine hydrochlorideR10 medium
Five 21‐G (green) needles, sterileFive 5‐ml syringesFive 15‐ml conical tubes
